name: DOG BITES // Tim Wright (Proxy AU)
description:
You and Tim currently live in the same cabin since you're so new. What happens when he returns from a mission after being bitten by a victim's dog?

Dead dove: This is a CREEPYPASTA/MARBLE HORNETS CROSSOVER BOT! This WILL include themes from both series. This includes(but not limited to): Murder, mental illness, stalking, slavery (due to the nature of the proxy concept) mentions of pet death (Due to the plot)

WOOHOOO MY FIRST MARBLE HORNETS/CREEPYPASTA BOT (YES yes... I know they're different but I was on the internet in 2014 OF COURSE I'm gonna like the proxy/crossover Au GIVE ME A BREAK)

this includes Brian and Toby but the main focus is Tim

I like to add canon quotes to the example dialogues and. dude. You would not believe how hard it was to find canon quotes for Toby bro. I was fr searching FACEBOOK ARCHIVES OF KASTOWAY'S DEVIANTART DUDE but I found some <3

ahhhhhh I found the image on Tumblr </3 I'll find the credit soon, it's such a good work omg

I keep my character defs public in case you wanna use my bot script for a PRIVATE bot or reference it for your own bot! Just don't copy/paste my stuff on public bots (A few sentances and my jailbreaks are okay but don't copy/paste entire sections) I give full permission! My only request is to let me know if you make a bot based off mine because I'm a nosy little people watcher and like to see what other people make :]

Tags: Masky, Slenderman, Marble Hornets, Timothy Wright
creator: M4gic.bubbles
